activationRule: Do not open real private pilot intake until the activation drill, signoff matrix, tabletop scenarios, evidence packet, rehearsal tasks, first-72-hour monitoring checks, and recorded go/hold/no-go decision have passed.
safetyRule: This public v3.2 activation drill package is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real names, emails, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, access logs, decision records, or private pilot evidence.
noGoTriggers: Real intake opens before the activation drill, tabletop scenarios, and signoff matrix are completed.
Authority decision is recorded without quorum, delegation, conditions, expiry, or stop triggers.
Private pilot records, access logs, incident evidence, official Toastmasters records, payment details, member numbers, or support details appear in public files.
No-private-access roles, providers, public reviewers, or supporters can view private records.
Withdrawal, correction, support, incident pause, breach assessment, backup/restore, deletion, or public redaction QA fails.
Official Toastmasters forms, signatures, payments, member numbers, or charter records enter the public package or private pilot tool.
Activation continues past the first 72 hours without authority checkpoint, monitoring evidence, or closeout trigger.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty
NHMRC Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander research ethics
OAIC Guide to undertaking privacy impact assessments
OAIC Data Breach Preparation and Response

decisionSequence.evidence: Named authority, privacy reviewer, data reviewer, technical custodian, and safety reviewer are present or have delegated authority
decisionSequence.drill: Meeting cannot proceed without required roles

decisionSequence.evidence: Purpose, participant group, exclusions, duration, data classes, and official Toastmasters boundary are restated
decisionSequence.noGo: Pilot scope expands during the meeting

decisionSequence.evidence: Developer can maintain package and tooling but cannot substitute for First Nations authority
decisionSequence.noGo: Repository maintainer is treated as authority

decisionSequence.evidence: Required IDS controls have pass, hold, owner, and evidence status
decisionSequence.drill: Hold items have owner and no activation exposure
decisionSequence.noGo: Data controls are assumed complete without evidence

decisionSequence.evidence: PIA checks, notice version, consent wording, withdrawal/correction, and retention rules are current
decisionSequence.noGo: Real intake opens on draft or stale wording

decisionSequence.evidence: No-private-access roles cannot see private records; admin/reviewer access is named and expiring
decisionSequence.noGo: Shared login or broad provider access exists

decisionSequence.evidence: MFA, backup/export/delete, log access, and recovery owner are checked
decisionSequence.noGo: Static demo or public repo becomes system of record

decisionSequence.step: Run breach and cultural safety tabletop
decisionSequence.evidence: Pause, containment, participant support, authority escalation, and notification assessment are rehearsed
decisionSequence.drill: Scenario outcome recorded without private details
decisionSequence.noGo: No one can pause after an incident

decisionSequence.evidence: Charter forms, payments, member numbers, signatures, and official records remain outside this package
decisionSequence.noGo: Official records enter public or pilot workspace

decisionSequence.evidence: Screenshots, CSVs, JSON, docs, and public update text contain fake/sample data only
decisionSequence.noGo: Public evidence identifies real people or context

decisionSequence.evidence: Withdrawal, correction, access support, and incident support have owner and response time
decisionSequence.drill: Support clock approved or hold recorded
decisionSequence.noGo: Participants cannot get help or withdraw safely

decisionSequence.evidence: Formal advice route is known for high-risk uncertainty, breach questions, or official record handling
Decision, conditions, holds, expiry, next review date, and no-go triggers are captured
decisionSequence.drill: Public status only; private evidence stays private

decisionSequence.evidence: Post-activation checks, support route, incident watch, access review, and closeout trigger are scheduled
decisionSequence.noGo: Activation opens with no early review

signoffMatrix.scope: Can approve, hold, stop, or expire activation

signoffMatrix.evidence: Decision rights and consultation path confirmed
signoffMatrix.scope: Can require hold for authority ambiguity

signoffMatrix.evidence: Data classes, purpose, access, retention, deletion, and reporting checked
signoffMatrix.scope: Can stop activation for data governance risk
signoffMatrix.publicRule: Class labels and pass/hold counts only
signoffMatrix.noGo: Data reuse or transfer is not controlled

signoffMatrix.evidence: PIA status, notice version, consent wording, and withdrawal route checked
signoffMatrix.scope: Can stop intake for privacy risk
signoffMatrix.noGo: People submit information without clear notice

signoffMatrix.evidence: Pause, support, escalation, and cultural safety route rehearsed
signoffMatrix.noGo: Incident route is unclear or unsafe

signoffMatrix.evidence: MFA, backups, access register, logs, exports, deletion, and restore drill checked
signoffMatrix.noGo: Private records stored publicly or broadly

signoffMatrix.evidence: Official forms, payments, signatures, member numbers, and charter path separated
signoffMatrix.scope: Can hold if official data crosses boundary

signoffMatrix.evidence: Release, screenshots, document viewer, JSON, CSV, and public wording checked
Support route, response clock, withdrawal/correction handoff ready
signoffMatrix.scope: Can hold until support is staffed

signoffMatrix.evidence: Provider sees fake/sample data only until authority and contract are approved
signoffMatrix.noGo: Provider gets real data too early

signoffMatrix.evidence: Backup admin activation rule and expiry documented
signoffMatrix.scope: Can act only after authority activation

signoffMatrix.evidence: Public update wording is aggregate, fake/sample, and redacted

tabletopScenarios.scenario: Real email accidentally added to public CSV
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Stop release, remove file, audit history, check screenshots, document no-go privately

tabletopScenarios.scenario: Participant asks to withdraw after intake opens
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Confirm route works, remove/correct private record, record proof privately, update aggregate count only

tabletopScenarios.scenario: Provider asks for sample production export
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Deny real export, provide fake package only, require authority and contract before private access

tabletopScenarios.scenario: Toastmasters member number entered in pilot form
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Delete or move to official route, review form controls, pause intake until exclusion works
tabletopScenarios.noGo: Official record remains in pilot tool

tabletopScenarios.scenario: Access support request includes sensitive details
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Move to private support route, limit access, check public evidence, confirm support owner

tabletopScenarios.scenario: Decidim admin role granted to wrong account
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Revoke immediately, review logs, rotate access if needed, retest role register

tabletopScenarios.scenario: Public learning note risks identifying a founder
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Rewrite aggregate summary, raise threshold, get authority approval before publishing

tabletopScenarios.scenario: Backup restore fails during dry run
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Hold activation until backup/export/delete and restore proof pass

tabletopScenarios.scenario: Authority quorum missing on approval day
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Do not activate; reschedule or use approved delegation route

tabletopScenarios.scenario: High-risk privacy question has no advice route
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Pause decision, seek advice route, update threshold and decision record

tabletopScenarios.scenario: All required checks pass with two conditions
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Approve limited activation with explicit conditions, expiry, owner, review date, and stop trigger
tabletopScenarios.noGo: Conditions have no owner or expiry

tabletopScenarios.scenario: All required checks pass and monitor is scheduled
tabletopScenarios.expectedAction: Approve controlled activation with 72-hour monitoring and closeout triggers

evidencePacket.proof: Attendance, role authority, and delegation status
Controls with owner, evidence, holds, and no-go triggers
PIA outcome, notice version, consent version, withdrawal route
evidencePacket.noGo: People see stale or unclear notice

evidencePacket.proof: Named accounts, role test, expiry, and revocation route
Scenario result, pause owner, escalation, support route
Checklist over pages, docs, CSV, JSON, screenshots
Provider gets fake/sample package only before approval
evidencePacket.noGo: Provider sees real data before contract

evidencePacket.proof: When advice is required and who requests it
Early checks, owners, escalation, and closeout trigger
Scale criteria referenced before wider rollout

rehearsalTasks.task: Submit fake EOI with notice and consent
rehearsalTasks.passSignal: Fake intake creates expected private record class only

rehearsalTasks.task: Withdraw fake participant and prove deletion/correction route
rehearsalTasks.passSignal: Withdrawal path works and proof is private

rehearsalTasks.task: Try no-private-access role against private record
Revoke and restore approved admin access
rehearsalTasks.passSignal: Revocation and backup admin route tested

rehearsalTasks.task: Export, backup, delete, and restore fake record
rehearsalTasks.noGo: Records cannot be deleted or restored

rehearsalTasks.passSignal: Assessment owner, threshold, and notification route known

rehearsalTasks.task: Route fake official membership question outside pilot
rehearsalTasks.passSignal: Official handoff does not store official records

rehearsalTasks.task: Publish fake aggregate update through redaction QA
rehearsalTasks.passSignal: No private context or identity inference

rehearsalTasks.task: Send fake provider handoff package only

rehearsalTasks.passSignal: Conditions, expiry, and stop triggers included
rehearsalTasks.noGo: Decision has no expiry or owner

rehearsalTasks.passSignal: Closeout review is scheduled before activation

monitorChecks.check: Confirm public demo still has fake/sample data only
Review first private intake record classes
monitorChecks.evidence: No unapproved fields or official records

monitorChecks.check: Check access logs and admin changes

monitorChecks.evidence: No unresolved safety or incident concern
Continue, hold, pause, or close decision recorded
Closeout review and retention/deletion path confirmed
